article_title: Vapi Raises $50 Million Series B at $500 Million Valuation as Voice AI Platform Surpasses 1 Billion Calls

findings.message: Source redirected to different domain: consent.yahoo.com

content_preview.title: Vapi Raises $50 Million Series B at $500 Million Valuation as Voice AI Platform Surpasses 1 Billion Calls
content_preview.summary: Voice AI infrastructure startup Vapi closes a $50M Series B led by Peak XV at a ~$500M valuation after surpassing 1 billion calls, with Amazon Ring routing 100% of its inbound volume through the platform.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

Voice AI infrastructure startup Vapi announced on May 12, 2026 that it has raised a $50 million Series B led by Peak XV Partners at a post-money valuation of approximately $500 million, bringing total funding to $72 million. The round, which also includes participation from M12 (Microsoft's Venture Fund), Kleiner Perkins, and Bessemer Venture Partners, arrives as the company crosses 1 billion calls processed on its platform, according to [TechCrunch](https://techcrunch.com/2026/05/1...

editor_notes.content_quality: Well-structured News piece with appropriate technical depth. Clear Overview, What We Know, What We Don't Know, and Analysis sections. Word count (703) fits the News category range.
editor_notes.source_verification: Read all 4 source snapshots. source-0.html.gz (TechCrunch): Confirmed $50M Series B led by Peak XV, ~$500M valuation, $72M total funding, M12/Kleiner Perkins/Bessemer participation, Amazon Ring deployment, 1 billion calls, 1-5M calls/day, Jason Mitura VP title, Jordan Dearsley/Nikhil Gupta founders. source-1.html.gz (GlobeNewswire press release): Confirmed enterprise customers (Amazon Ring, Kavak, ServiceTitan, New York Life, Intuit), 1 billion calls, Arnav Sahu quote verbatim. source-2.html.gz (SiliconANGLE): Confirmed Jason Mitura quote verbatim ('When [Amazon] Ring customers call in...'), Jordan Dearsley CEO quote verbatim, sector focus (financial services, healthcare, insurance, automotive, workforce management). source-3.html.gz (Yahoo Finance): Redirected to consent.yahoo.com cookie gate — content inaccessible. Note: The Arnav Sahu quote is attributed to Yahoo Finance in the article body but was found verbatim in GlobeNewswire (source-1), which is the originating press release. Yahoo Finance commonly reprints GlobeNewswire releases, so the fact is verifiable; misattribution of outlet is minor. The article says Ring evaluated 'more than 40 vendors' while TechCrunch headline says '40 rivals' — this is consistent. All primary financial and factual claims confirmed.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All key figures confirmed: $50M raise, $500M valuation, $72M total, 1B calls, 1-5M calls/day, 1M+ developers, 2.7M agents. Amazon Ring VP name and title confirmed. Both CEO quotes and investor quote verified verbatim in sources.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and professional throughout. No sensationalism. Analysis section is appropriately measured.
editor_notes.originality: No existing Vapi coverage found in the article archive. New topic.
concerns: Yahoo Finance source (source-3) redirected to consent page and was inaccessible. Arnav Sahu quote attributed to Yahoo Finance in article but confirmed verbatim in GlobeNewswire press release — minor outlet misattribution, substantively verified.
recommendations: Consider attributing Arnav Sahu quote to GlobeNewswire rather than Yahoo Finance in future submissions, as Yahoo Finance requires cookie consent and the press release is the primary source.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Strong, well-sourced News article. All major claims independently verified across TechCrunch and GlobeNewswire primary sources. The Yahoo Finance misattribution is immaterial given the quote is confirmed verbatim in the originating press release. APPROVE.
